colors.strategy: Swiss High-Contrast: stark backgrounds, strong structural gray borders, and International Klein Blue for high-authority actions.

layout_and_spacing.general_grid_rules: Grid items must be direct children. Override default stretch with align-items: start where necessary.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: max 8px (rounded-md). Do not use fully rounded pill shapes.
layout_and_spacing.container_padding: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.

surfaces.header: Crystal Glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-200 shadow-sm.
surfaces.dashboard_cards: Solid white background, 1px subtle border, no shadow. Hover: -translate-y-1 shadow-md border-gray-300 transition-all.
surfaces.event_cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border. Image on top (max-h-48 object-cover). Card body p-6.

components_instructions.navigation: Header must have visible brand name, 3-5 links, primary CTA. Sticky positioning with z-50.
components_instructions.tables: Use Shadcn Table. Implement sortable columns, inline action dropdowns, and pagination. Use clean horizontal borders.
components_instructions.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Never use native inputs directly. Add crisp focus rings.
components_instructions.buttons: Primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-blue-800. Secondary: bg-white text-gray-900 border border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50.
components_instructions.notifications: Use Sonner for toast notifications. Success alerts on registration.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Always explicitly set text color on hover. Example: hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-900
motion_and_interaction.focus_states: High contrast ring. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:ring-offset-1 focus:outline-none
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use specific properties: transition-transform duration-200 ease-out, transition-colors duration-200 ease-out

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on role (e.g., data-testid='event-register-button', data-testid='admin-create-event-submit').

image_urls.description: Large group of people outdoors (community event)
image_urls.placement_instructions: Use as default image for generic college events if admin doesn't upload one.

image_urls.description: Code on laptop screen, dark backdrop
image_urls.placement_instructions: Use as an example event image for 'Tech Hackathon' or similar events.

image_urls.description: Group of college students walking together
image_urls.placement_instructions: Use for dashboard welcome section or user onboarding.

image_urls.description: Scenic view of campus buildings and students
image_urls.placement_instructions: Use for login/signup page background or main landing portal.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: lucide-react, sonner, react-router-dom, and shadcn components.
Override default tailwind configuration to use the Swiss High-Contrast colors provided.
Implement the UI using .js (JSX) files, NOT .tsx files.
The application is a 'Control Room' dashboard app type. Do not use generic floating cards everywhere; anchor sections with crisp borders.
Implement JWT-based auth with clear admin/student separation.
Build the Event Management table in the Admin dashboard with pagination, search, and action menus.
For the User dashboard, build an 'Event Cards Grid' for browsing and registering.
Show success alerts using Sonner when an event registration is completed.
Apply 'data-testid' to ALL buttons, links, inputs, and key text nodes to ensure testing works smoothly.
NEVER use placeholder text (like 'Lorem Ipsum') or dummy image URLs. Only use the provided media URLs.
